test_details.name: Critical Alert Engine Help
test_details.output:
Usage:
  python3 critical-alert-engine.py create <message> [urgency] [source] [category]
  python3 critical-alert-engine.py retry-check
  python3 critical-alert-engine.py respond [alert_id|minutes_back]
  python3 critical-alert-engine.py status
  python3 critical-alert-engine.py report

test_details.name: Alert Retry Processor Help
test_details.output:
Usage:
  node alert-retry-processor.js heartbeat      # Run heartbeat check
  node alert-retry-processor.js retries       # Process retries only
  node alert-retry-processor.js auto-mark     # Auto-mark recent alerts
  node alert-retry-processor.js status        # Get system status
  node alert-retry-processor.js report        # Generate report
  node alert-retry-processor.js escalated     # Check escalated alerts

test_details.name: Netty Adapter Help
test_details.output:
Usage:
  python3 netty-urgent-adapter.py process    # Process current gaps for urgency
  python3 netty-urgent-adapter.py analyze    # Analyze gaps without routing
  python3 netty-urgent-adapter.py test <text> # Test urgency classification
